about.description:
ADIOS2 is the latest implementation of the ADaptable Input Output System,
ADIOS. This brand new architecture was designed to continue supporting the
performance legacy of ADIOS, and extend its current capabilities to address
current and future input/output (IO) challenges in the scientific data
lifecycle through effective research and development (R&D) activities.
about.summary: Next generation of ADIOS developed in the Exascale Computing Program

raw_meta_yaml:
# This recipe uses the v1 YAML format introduced by CEP 13
# For more information see: https://prefix-dev.github.io/rattler-build/latest/reference/recipe_file/

context:
  name: adios2
  version: 2.11.0
  sha256: 0a2bd745e3f39745f07587e4a5f92d72f12fa0e2be305e7957bdceda03735dbf
  build_number: 7

recipe:
  name: ${{ name }}
  version: ${{ version }}

source:
  url: https://github.com/ornladios/ADIOS2/archive/v${{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: ${{ sha256 }}

build:
  number: ${{ build_number }}

outputs:
  - staging:
      name: adios2-build
    build:
      script:
        file: ${{ "build-libadios.sh" if unix else "build-libadios.bat" }}
        env:
          mpi: ${{ mpi }}
    requirements:
      build:
        - ${{ compiler('c') }}
        - ${{ compiler('cxx') }}
        - ${{ stdlib('c') }}
        - ${{ compiler('fortran') }}
        - ${{ "ninja" if unix }}
        - ${{ "make" if unix }}
        - ${{ "pkg-config" if unix }}
        - ${{ "flex" if unix }}
        - ${{ "bison" if unix }}
        - cmake
        - ${{ "python" if build_platform != target_platform }}
        - ${{ "cross-python_" + target_platform if build_platform != target_platform }}
        - ${{ "numpy" if build_platform != target_platform }}
        - ${{ mpi if mpi != "nompi" and build_platform != target_platform }}
      host:
        - python
        - numpy
        - ${{ mpi if mpi != "nompi" }}
        - ${{ "mpi4py" if mpi != "nompi" }}
        - libffi
        - hdf5
        - "hdf5 * ${{ 'nompi' if mpi == 'nompi' else 'mpi_' + mpi }}_*"
        - ${{ "zeromq" if not win }}
        - ${{ "libsodium" if not win }}
        - bzip2
        - c-blosc2
        - libpng
        - zfp
        - ${{ "ucx" if linux and mpi != "nompi" and target_platform != "linux-ppc64le" }}
        - zlib
      ignore_run_exports:
        from_package:
          - python
          - numpy
          - mpi4py
          - cross-python_${{ target_platform }}

  # C++ library: shared libs, cmake config, headers only (no Python, no CLI tools)
  - package:
      name: libadios2
    inherit: adios2-build
    build:
      # No python version in build string: libadios2 contains no Python files
      string: ${{ 'nompi' if mpi == 'nompi' else 'mpi_' + mpi }}_h${{ hash }}_${{ build_number + (100 if mpi == 'nompi' else 0) }}
      skip:
        - if: python_impl == "pypy"
          then: true
        - if: win and mpi != 'nompi'
          then: true
    requirements:
      run_exports:
        strong:
          - ${{ pin_subpackage('libadios2', exact=True) }}
    tests:
      - requirements:
          run:
            - ${{ compiler('c') }}
            - ${{ compiler('cxx') }}
            - ${{ stdlib('c') }}
            - cmake
            - if: unix
              then:
                - make
        files:
          source:
            - examples/
          recipe:
            - test-libadios.sh
        script:
          - if: unix
            then:
              - test -f ${PREFIX}/lib/cmake/adios2/adios2-config.cmake
              - test -f ${PREFIX}/lib/cmake/adios2/adios2-c-targets.cmake
              - test -f ${PREFIX}/lib/cmake/adios2/adios2-cxx-targets.cmake
              - test -f ${PREFIX}/lib/libadios2_cxx${SHLIB_EXT}
              - test -f ${PREFIX}/lib/libadios2_c${SHLIB_EXT}
              # Verify Python files are absent from this package
              - test ! -d ${SP_DIR}/adios2
              - test ! -f ${PREFIX}/bin/bp5dbg
              - mpi=${{ mpi }} bash test-libadios.sh
          - if: win
            then:
              - if exist %LIBRARY_PREFIX%\bin\adios2_cxx.dll (exit 0) else (exit 1)
              - if exist %LIBRARY_PREFIX%\bin\adios2_c.dll (exit 0) else (exit 1)
              - if exist %LIBRARY_PREFIX%\lib\cmake\adios2\adios2-config.cmake (exit 0) else (exit 1)
              - if exist %LIBRARY_PREFIX%\lib\cmake\adios2\adios2-c-targets.cmake (exit 0) else (exit 1)
              - if exist %LIBRARY_PREFIX%\lib\cmake\adios2\adios2-cxx-targets.cmake (exit 0) else (exit 1)

  # Python bindings + CLI tools (bpls, bp5dbg, etc.)
  - package:
      name: adios2
    # Don't propagate staging host-dep run_exports; adios2 only needs python + libadios2.
    inherit:
      from: adios2-build
      run_exports: false
    build:
      string: ${{ 'nompi' if mpi == 'nompi' else 'mpi_' + mpi }}_py${{ python | version_to_buildstring }}_h${{ hash }}_${{ build_number + (100 if mpi == 'nompi' else 0) }}
      script:
        file: ${{ "build-adios-py.sh" if unix else "build-adios-py.bat" }}
      skip:
        - if: python_impl == "pypy"
          then: true
        - if: win and mpi != 'nompi'
          then: true
    requirements:
      build:
        - ${{ compiler('c') }}
        - ${{ compiler('cxx') }}
        - ${{ stdlib('c') }}
        - cmake
        - if: build_platform != target_platform
          then:
            - python
            - cross-python_${{ target_platform }}
            - numpy
        - if: mpi != "nompi" and build_platform != target_platform
          then: ${{ mpi }}
      run:
        - python
        - ${{ pin_subpackage('libadios2', exact=True) }}
        - numpy
        - "python_abi * *_cp${{ python | version_to_buildstring }}"
        - if: mpi != "nompi"
          then:
            - ${{ mpi }}
            - mpi4py
      run_exports:
        # Downstream packages that host adios2 get adios2 (Python + tools) at runtime
        - ${{ pin_subpackage('adios2', exact=True) }}
    tests:
      - script:
          - python -c "import adios2; print(adios2.__version__)"
          - if: unix
            then:
              - bp5dbg --help
              - bpls --help
          - if: win
            then:
              - if exist %LIBRARY_PREFIX%\bin\bp5dbg (exit 0) else (exit 1)

about:
  homepage: https://www.olcf.ornl.gov/center-projects/adios/
  license: Apache-2.0
  license_file: LICENSE
  summary: Next generation of ADIOS developed in the Exascale Computing Program
  description: |
    ADIOS2 is the latest implementation of the ADaptable Input Output System,
    ADIOS. This brand new architecture was designed to continue supporting the
    performance legacy of ADIOS, and extend its current capabilities to address
    current and future input/output (IO) challenges in the scientific data
    lifecycle through effective research and development (R&D) activities.
  documentation: https://adios2.readthedocs.io
  repository: https://github.com/ornladios/ADIOS2

extra:
  feedstock-name: adios2
  recipe-maintainers:
    - ax3l
    - vicentebolea
    - williamfgc
